steps: Fix cells in 4% paraformaldehyde in PBS pH 7.4 .
Block cells in 5% normal goat serum and 0.2% Triton X-100.
Dilute primary antibodies in 5% normal goat serum. Primary antibodies are listed in the "Guidelines".
Incubate samples with primary antibodies Overnight at 4 °C .
Mount on glass slides using ProLong antifade.
Randomly select 10 different fields to use for counting the number of DAPI-positive cells expressing specific markers in ImageJ. Perform this with at least three independent experiments.
Stain using Cy3‐ and Alexa Fluor 488‐labeled secondary antibodies.
creator: Anita Broellochs
